title: cordia latiloba
intro: Cordia latiloba, also known as the Mexican Cordia or Mexican Cordia Tree, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of gastrointestinal issues, fever, and inflammation due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cordia latiloba include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Cordia latiloba can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders and other health issues.
